## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Added a changeset if this affects published packages (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Updated docs / README when behavior or API changed
